parameters.label: Audio Encoding
parameters.helpText: Available to websocket DSL bindings as "encoding".
parameters.errorMessage: Please select a valid audio encoding for custom STT.

parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.helpText: Available to websocket DSL bindings as "sample_rate".
parameters.errorMessage: Please select a valid sample rate for custom STT.

parameters.label: Query Parameters
parameters.helpText: Optional flat JSON object for dynamic STT query params. Use {"$var":"..."} and optional {"$cast":"number","value":...} bindings.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide valid query parameters for custom STT.

parameters.label: Request Rules
parameters.helpText: Ordered STT request rules aligned to normalized packets. Each rule defines when.packet plus send.frame/send.body using "$path" and optional "$cast" expressions over config.* and packet.*.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide valid request rules for custom STT.

parameters.label: Response Rules
parameters.helpText: Required JSON rule list for STT responses. Each rule defines a text or JSON frame match and emit expressions for script, confidence, language, interim, and error.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide valid response rules for custom STT.
